data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for targeting bindings.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to target bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the existence of these bindings. The linked use case mentions the need for these bindings but lacks specific evidence of their implementation, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence of targeting bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the required bindings.
